case_title: SUN KENG CHAN VS. ELADIO JOSE CAMACHO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, SUN KENG
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, SUN KENG AS TO DEFENDANT CAMACHO, ELADIO JOSE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CAMACHO, ELADIO JOSE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CAMACHO, ELADIO JOSE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, SUN KENG SERVED SEP-05-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAMACHO, ELADIO JOSE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, SUN KENG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMACHO, ELADIO JOSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 15 SONOMA STREET, APT. 2 ROOM A, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94133, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CAMACHO, ELADIO JOSE
